Dilanthes revoluta, or Chinese Dilantias, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the lily family (Asparagaceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Dilantias revoluta include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant are tea and infusions, which are used to relieve coughs and congestion.
